title: Royalford Casserole Dish with Tempered Glass Lid | Cooking Pot, Induction Stockpot Saucepan with Non-Stick Granite Coating | Forged Aluminium Cookware, Suitable for Multiple Hobs | Black (Black)
features: ✅ [PREMIUM NON-STICK CASSEROLE DISH]- With a non-stick granite coating for improved performance, easy cooking and cleaning. Comes with embossed extra thick dot induction bottom for quick & even heat distribution.

✅ [DURABLE INDUCTION BOTTOM] – This cooker has an induction bottom, making it suitable for multiple cooking hop types – including gas, hotplate, halogen and ceramic. Due to Induction bottom, it ensures efficient heat distribution and evenly cooks the food. It is PFOA free, No need to worry about reacting with food or altering natural flavours.

✅ [FORGED ALUMINIUM BUILD, 5 LAYER CONSTRUCTION] - Made of forged aluminum so it conducts and distributes heat evenly and avoid hot spots too - for nice, even results. And the granite coating means you can use even less cooking oil for healthier eating – Perfect for heart-warming casseroles and stews or curries.

✅ [VENTED TEMPERED GLASS LID, COOL TOUCH HANDLES]- The casserole pan features soft touch heat resistant knob and tempered glass lid with steel frame which fixes the lid in place while locking in moisture and flavour of your meals, with a vent hole to allow for gentle evaporation without letting your dishes get dried out.

✅ [MULTIPURPOSE] - Ideal for simmering soups, broths and vegetables, to making a delicious stew, ragout, jambalaya, tagine, chilli, broths and stocks noodles or goulash, and for cooking pasta or boiling potatoes.
description: Product Description Royalford 24 cm Casserole Dish with Tempered Glass Lid Royalford Forged Aluminium Casserole/Stockpot Enhance your kitchen with the Royalford casserole saucepan, featuring unique non-stick quality cookware designed for optimum cooking performance at home. Enjoy meals without food sticking to the pan during cooking. Ideal for Healthy Cooking Requiring little to no oil thanks to its non-stick coating, this casserole is ideal for creating healthy, low-oil alternatives to a variety of meals. Ease of use With toughened tempered glass, you can control your cooking to ensure no messy spills and complete cooking convenience, stay-cool handles, allowing for comfort and control when handling. PREMIUM NON-STICK CASSEROLE DISH With a non-stick granite coating for improved performance, easy cooking and cleaning. Comes with embossed extra thick dot induction bottom for quick & even heat distribution. VENTED TEMPERED GLASS LID, COOL TOUCH HANDLES The casserole pan features soft touch heat resistant knob and tempered glass lid with steel frame which fixes the lid in place while locking in moisture and flavour of your meals, with a vent hole to allow for gentle evaporation without letting your dishes get dried out. DURABLE INDUCTION BOTTOM This cooker has an induction bottom, making it suitable for multiple cooking hop types – including gas, hotplate, halogen and ceramic. Due to Induction bottom, it ensures efficient heat distribution and evenly cooks the food. It is PFOA free, No need to worry about reacting with food or altering natural flavours. FORGED ALUMINIUM BUILD, 5 LAYER CONSTRUCTION Made of forged aluminum so it conducts and distributes heat evenly and avoid hot spots too - for nice, even results. And the granite coating means you can use even less cooking oil for healthier eating – Perfect for heart-warming casseroles and stews or curries.
